mainEntity.name: How long should AEO answers be for Phoenix law firms?
mainEntity.text: How long should AEO answers be for Phoenix law firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: AEO answers for Phoenix lawyers should be 40-60 words: direct, factual, and snippet-optimized for AI extraction in overviews and voice results.[4]

suggestedAnswer.text: Phoenix's growing legal market demands concise AEO content. Example: Answer 'Phoenix DUI penalties' in under 60 words with sources. Longer text dilutes AI pickup; test variations for 'People Also Ask' expansion. Firms risk irrelevance without this precision.[1][4]

name: Ideal AEO Answer Length for Phoenix Firms
description: AEO answers for Phoenix lawyers should be 40-60 words: direct, factual, and snippet-optimized for AI extraction in overviews and voice results.[4]
